scripts.test:api: sh -c 'OUT=$(mktemp -d /tmp/ajentic-ui-api-behavior-XXXXXX) && trap "rm -rf \"$OUT\"" EXIT && tsc --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir "$OUT" src/api/runBehaviorTests.ts && node "$OUT/api/runBehaviorTests.js"'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'OUT=/tmp/ajentic-ui-runtime && rm -rf "$OUT" && mkdir -p "$OUT" && tsc --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --rootDir src --outDir "$OUT" src/app/localReviewRuntime.ts && node -e "const runtime=require(\"/tmp/ajentic-ui-runtime/app/localReviewRuntime.js\"); console.log(runtime.renderLocalReviewRuntime())"'
